title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.370 - Penalties
text:
338.370.  Penalties. — Every person who violates any provision of sections 338.333, 338.337, and 338.340 shall, upon conviction thereof, be adjudged guilty of a class D felony.
(L. 1989 S.B. 39 § 338.420, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
